consolidated_what_worked_well: TDD workflow produced comprehensive test coverage exceeding 95% threshold across multiple stories
Parallel validator pattern (test-automator, code-reviewer, security-auditor) achieved 100% pass rate
Atomic story update protocol prevented YAML frontmatter divergence
Phase marker system enabled sequential verification and resume capability
ADR-010 enforcement correctly blocked false completion - coverage thresholds as CRITICAL blockers
Gap-driven remediation workflow efficiently focused on specific coverage gaps
Remediation iteration pattern (QA fail → /dev --fix → QA re-run) worked effectively
AC-DoD traceability validation achieved 100% mapping across all stories

consolidated_areas_for_improvement.issue: Package structure coupling in __init__.py creates tight coupling between unrelated modules
Method length violations (>150 lines) not caught in TDD refactor phase
PYTHONPATH must be set manually for pytest - not codified in config
Test file exceeds coding-standards.md limits (1865 lines > 300 limit)
Coverage pre-check timing - gaps caught at Phase 10 instead of Phase 04/05

consolidated_recommendations.description: Implement lazy imports in package __init__.py files to prevent cascade failures
Add code complexity check to TDD Refactor phase (Phase 04) in devforgeai-development skill
consolidated_recommendations.implementation_notes: Check method length (<50 lines) and file size (<500 lines) before proceeding to Phase 05

consolidated_recommendations.description: Add coverage threshold check in Phase 04 or 05 before declaring TDD complete
consolidated_recommendations.implementation_notes: Run coverage check against 95%/85%/80% thresholds after refactoring-specialist completes

consolidated_recommendations.description: Add PYTHONPATH=src to pyproject.toml pytest configuration
Add gaps.json auto-detection in /dev command Phase 0.1 for automatic remediation mode
consolidated_recommendations.implementation_notes: Check if devforgeai/qa/reports/STORY-XXX-gaps.json exists, auto-set REMEDIATION_MODE=true

consolidated_recommendations.description: Enhance test-automator to generate exception handling tests by default
consolidated_recommendations.implementation_notes: Add checklist: happy path, error return paths, exception handlers, boundary conditions

consolidated_recommendations.description: Create helper method extraction prompt in TDD workflow for DRY violations
consolidated_recommendations.implementation_notes: After tests pass, check for code duplication >3 times → extract helper method

anti_patterns_detected.evidence: ASTParser class with 10 public methods handling 4 languages
anti_patterns_detected.remediation: Apply Single Responsibility Principle - one parser class per language
Extract to class methods for independent testability

patterns_observed: Exception handling code paths are consistently under-tested in initial TDD cycles
CLI layer coverage tends to lag behind business logic coverage
MVP acceptance of technical debt occurs when velocity is prioritized
Remediation → QA re-run cycle is effective but adds workflow overhead
Static analysis provides high confidence even without test execution
Phase markers enable workflow resume - design pattern worth replicating

constraint_analysis.coding_standards_compliance: 75% - File size and method length violations noted

rca_reason: No workflow failures requiring root cause analysis - all issues are improvement opportunities
